Off Calendar May-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Anthony L. Vignolo; Downey Brand LLP; 209-473-6450; appearing as counsel for defendants Tony Brettkelly and Yale Residences, LLC.
Ashley E. Klein; Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck, LLP; 415-926-7600; appearing as counsel for plaintiff Bush Street Apartment Group, LLC.

Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is GRANTED as requested by the moving defendants Yale Residences and Tony Brettkelly (alter ego) on the Second Cause of Action (Breach of Written Contract), the Sixth Cause of Action (Breach of Implied Covenant of Good Faith and Fair Dealing), and the Seventh Cause of Action (Negligence) as to the claim for monthly rent damages from August 2020 through June 2026 . Moving parties shifter their burden to establish that the corporate tenant is a tier 1 commercial tenant entitled to protections of the SF Administrative Code 37C and that there is no liability for rent by the individual defendant, based only on alter ego (motion for summary judgment is framed by the pleadings). Opposing party failed to raise any triable issues of fact.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) and in accordance with CCP Section 437c(g). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR #13714, apourtabib@gmail.com, 415-601-7054. (D501)
